ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "experiment_tag" TEXT /* Tag or label for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the experiment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment configuration */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the experiment this configuration belongs to */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the experiment */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used in the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture used */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Type of optimizer used (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the experiment this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "tf_test_acc" REAL /* Test accuracy of the trial */,
  "average_res" REAL /* Average result of the trial */,
  "time_this_iter_s" REAL /* Time taken for this iteration */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Whether the trial is done */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial result was last updated */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value for the trial */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision value for the trial */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall value for the trial */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the trial */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment configuration used in this trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES experiment_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training iteration */,
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trial this iteration belongs to */,
  "timesteps_total" INTEGER /* Total timesteps in this iteration */,
  "episodes_total" INTEGER /* Total episodes in this iteration */,
  "training_iteration" INTEGER /* Training iteration number */,
  "time_total_s" REAL /* Total time taken for this iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training iteration was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training iteration was last updated */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value for the training iteration */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value for the training iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_iterations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_results ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus or area of research */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
